name: translation-ai
description: Translation Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: Translate text between languages using built-in dictionary and word mapping.

tools.name: detect_language
tools.description: Detect the language of input text using script and word analysis.

tools.name: check_grammar
tools.description: Check text for common grammar and style issues.

tools.name: adjust_tone
tools.description: Analyze text tone and provide recommendations for adjustment.

tools.name: validate_localization
tools.description: Validate localized strings for common internationalization issues.
